# Dta

**Summary**: A thermal analysis technique used to identify minerals based on their decomposition temperatures.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1985-ghaled|Ghaled, 1985]] used DTA to determine the decomposition temperature of magnesite for refractory use.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The decomposition temperature of Zarghat magnesite was found to be approximately 620°C. ([[1985-ghaled|Ghaled, 1985, p. 86]])
